project: ARSA-X — Agentic Robotic Surgery Assistant eXtended
summary: Bimanual autonomous surgical suturing on Franka Panda (7-DOF) + Allegro Hand (16-DOF) + second Panda assistant arm (7-DOF) in MuJoCo. 10 atomic surgical skills including bimanual tissue stabilization, per-finger tactile sensing (63 sensors), 30 position-controlled actuators, 5 suture patterns, and finger gaiting for in-hand needle reorientation.

architecture.controller: closed-loop residual policy with tactile feedback
architecture.residual_policy: proportional gain + EMA smoothing from wrist F/T, per-finger tactile force distribution, needle error, slip detection
architecture.control_mode: direct qpos position control with per-tick re-setting

headline_metrics.controller: closed-loop residual with per-finger tactile feedback
headline_metrics.mode: autonomous + teleop + video + evaluation + data-collection + compare + showcase + audit

primary_artifacts.scene: arsax/scene/ (programmatic MjSpec subpackage with scene, robot, tissue, sensors modules) + arsax_scene.xml (standalone MJCF)
